app.name: Sugarcube
app.one_liner: Design tokens in, CSS & components out.

screens.name: Token Processing Dashboard
screens.purpose: Orchestrate token ingestion, transformation, and output generation for front-end artifacts.

rust_commands.name: generate_styles
rust_commands.purpose: Process design tokens and emit CSS variables, utility classes, and components.

rust_commands.name: validate_tokens
rust_commands.purpose: Check design tokens for DTCG compliance and structural correctness.

rust_commands.name: watch_tokens
rust_commands.purpose: Monitor token files and regenerate outputs on change with HMR support via Vite plugin.

mvp_plan: week 1: Expose CLI commands for generate, validate, and watch
week 1: Generate valid CSS variables from tokens
week 1: Implement core token parsing and $root resolution logic
acceptance_tests: CLI generates utility classes and CUBE CSS from DTCG tokens
Given a token group with $root, output CSS variable uses base name (e.g., --blue not --blue-$root)
Token validation fails on non-DTCG structures
Vite plugin supports HMR when tokens change during development
